image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Imagine a teaspoon of matter weighing billions of tons.
Context visual: That’s the reality of neutron stars, the remnants of supernova explosions.
Escalation visual: These stellar corpses pack more mass than our Sun into a sphere the size of a city.
Evidence visual: One teaspoon of neutron star material could crush anything on Earth.
Payoff visual: Their intense gravity creates bizarre phenomena, like pulsars—rotating stars emitting beams of radiation.
Cta visual: Curious about more cosmic wonders? Hit follow for the latest in astrophysics!
